commit_message_generation.custom_instructions:
Generate commit messages following the Conventional Commits specification (https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).

Format:
<type>(<optional scope>): <short summary in imperative mood>

<optional body>

Rules:
- type MUST be one of: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert
- scope should reflect the affected area (e.g., components, tokens, theme, docs, motion, utils, deps, config)
- summary must be lowercase, imperative mood, no period at end, max 72 characters
- body (if needed) should explain WHAT changed and WHY, not HOW
- if a change is breaking, add '!' after the type/scope: e.g. feat(components)!: remove Button size prop

Examples:
- feat(components): add Accordion component with expand/collapse animation
- fix(theme): resolve dark mode flickering on initial load
- docs: add installation guide for design system package
- refactor(utils): simplify cn utility to reduce bundle size
- chore(deps): bump next.js to 16.1.1
- build(ds): update tsup config for esm tree-shaking
- style(primitives): fix inconsistent spacing in Heading component
